message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Tier List: Best Gamepasses & Units 2026",
  description: "Discover the ultimate Anime Tactical Simulator tier list for gamepasses and units in 2026. Prioritize upgrades, optimize luck, and build a dominant team with our expert guide.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B5CF6/fff?text=Anime+Tactical+Simulator+Tier+List",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Mastering the **Anime Tactical Simulator tier list** for gamepasses is crucial for efficient progression.
- Prioritize **S-tier gamepasses** like Card Access and +2 Units Equip for immediate impact.
- Maximizing **Luck** through gamepasses, achievements, and rerolls significantly improves unit acquisition.
- Focus on powerful **unit traits** like Extremist and Dead Eye for optimal damage output.
- Utilize **AFK grinding strategies** to efficiently farm resources and powerful units like Igris.
</Callout>

Welcome, Commander, to the definitive guide on the **Anime Tactical Simulator tier list** for 2026. In this strategic Roblox experience, building an unstoppable team and optimizing your progression hinges on making smart choices, especially when it comes to gamepasses and unit selection. Whether you're a new recruit or a seasoned veteran, understanding which upgrades offer the most value and how to acquire top-tier units is paramount. This guide will walk you through the essential gamepasses, unit optimization strategies, and crucial tips to dominate the battlefield.

<Section icon={Map} title="Mastering Your Roster: Understanding the Anime Tactical Simulator Tier List">
To truly excel in Anime Tactical Simulator, a clear understanding of what makes a unit or gamepass "top-tier" is essential. This isn't just about raw power; it's about efficiency, utility, and how well elements synergize to accelerate your progress. A well-chosen gamepass can dramatically cut down grind time, while a unit with optimized traits can turn the tide of any battle.

<Callout type="tip" title="Optimize Your Unit Acquisition">
Increasing your **Luck** is one of the most effective ways to acquire higher-tier units and rarer items, directly impacting your team's overall power level. Focus on boosting this stat early on.
</Callout>

One of the foundational aspects of getting powerful units is maximizing your luck. The more luck you have, the better your chances of rolling rare and mythical units with strong traits. This often involves a combination of in-game mechanics and strategic gamepass purchases.

**Video Highlights:**
- Learn the **fastest ways** to get max luck in Anime Tactical Simulator.
- Discover how **rerolls** and dungeon raids contribute to better units.
- Understand the role of **achievements** and Shenron wishes in boosting luck.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="VtwcoMwnAQw" title="How To Get Max Luck EASILY In Anime Tactical Simulator!" />

Your journey to a top-tier roster begins with understanding these core systems. Without a solid foundation in luck and efficient unit acquisition, even the best strategies will fall short.

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepass Tier List: Prioritize Your Robux & Gems">
Gamepasses offer permanent boosts and upgrades that significantly impact your gameplay in Anime Tactical Simulator. Deciding which ones to invest your hard-earned Robux or Gems in can be daunting. Our comprehensive **Anime Tactical Simulator Gamepass Tier List** helps you prioritize, ensuring you get the most bang for your buck.

<CardGrid cols={4}>
  <Card title="S-Tier: Essential Boosts">
    - **Crucial for progression**
    - Unlock core functionalities
    - Massive time savings
  </Card>
  <Card title="A-Tier: Strong Perks">
    - **Excellent secondary options**
    - Noticeable impact on grind
    - Great value after S-tier
  </Card>
  <Card title="B-Tier: Situational Upgrades">
    - **Consider with excess Gems**
    - Minor improvements
    - Avoid using Robux
  </Card>
  <Card title="C-Tier: Low Impact">
    - **Minimal gameplay effect**
    - Generally not recommended
    - Purchase only if all others are owned
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="success" title="S-Tier Gamepasses: Must-Haves">
These gamepasses provide foundational benefits that streamline your gameplay and are highly recommended for every player to acquire as soon as possible. They are the backbone of efficient progression.
</Callout>

### S-Tier Gamepasses

| Gamepass | Effect | Price (Gems / Robux) |
| :------- | :----- | :------------------- |
| Card Access | Open cards anywhere, anytime | **7000 Gems** / 699 Robux |
| +3 Cards Open | Open 3 additional cards simultaneously | **2500 Gems** / 249 Robux |
| +2 Units Equip | Increases your active unit slots by 2 | **4000 Gems** / 399 Robux |

### A-Tier Gamepasses

| Gamepass | Effect | Price (Gems / Robux) |
| :------- | :----- | :------------------- |
| x2 Golds | Double Gold/Yen from all sources | **3500 Gems** / 349 Robux |
| x2 Experience | Units receive double XP from enemies | **3000 Gems** / 299 Robux |

### B-Tier Gamepasses

| Gamepass | Effect | Price (Gems / Robux) |
| :------- | :----- | :------------------- |
| Ultra Lucky | Massively improves Luck | **15000 Gems** / 1499 Robux |
| Super Lucky | Great boost in Luck | **6000 Gems** / 599 Robux |
| Lucky | Decent improvement in Luck | **1000 Gems** / 99 Robux |
| Fast Spins | Quicker Wheel spins | **2000 Gems** / 199 Robux |
| Fast Rerolls | Quicker rerolls for traits | **7000 Gems** / 699 Robux |
| VIP | Golden Nametag, 1.15x Gold, 1.05x XP | **2500 Gems** / 249 Robux |

### C-Tier Gamepasses

| Gamepass | Effect | Price (Gems / Robux) |
| :------- | :----- | :------------------- |
| Mega Storage | Greatly increases unit storage capacity | **4000 Gems** / 399 Robux |
| Small Storage | Slightly increases unit storage capacity | **500 Gems** / 49 Robux |

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Boosting Your Odds: Maximizing Luck & Unit Acquisition">
Acquiring high-tier units in Anime Tactical Simulator often comes down to a combination of persistent grinding and strategic luck enhancement. While gamepasses offer a direct boost, several in-game methods can further tip the scales in your favor. This section details how to get the most out of your unit rolls.

<Callout type="warning" title="Grinding Can Be Time-Consuming">
Maximizing luck and acquiring specific units, especially mythical ones, can be very time-consuming. Prepare for extensive grinding sessions or consider AFK farming methods to ease the process.
</Callout>

### Steps to Maximize Your Luck

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Farm Mythical Raids">
    Target **Nightmare or Hard mode raids** for whichever mythical unit you possess. These raids yield valuable rerolls and resources. For example, if you have Broly, do the Nightmare Broly raid.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Utilize Rerolls Wisely">
    Accumulate a large number of rerolls. Once you have a substantial amount (e.g., 3000+), go to the reroll station and aim for **Fortune** or **Gold** traits on your units, depending on your goal.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Complete Achievements">
    Many in-game achievements offer **percentage buffs to your luck**. Regularly check and complete these to gain passive luck increases without active grinding.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Wish at Shenron">
    After collecting all Dragon Balls, visit Shenron and select the wish that **increases luck by one**. This is a powerful, permanent boost.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Equip Luck-Boosting Gear">
    Certain accessories, like the **Richie Armor (20% Luck)**, are excellent for your luck team. Equip all available luck-boosting armor and accessories to your units.
  </Step>
</Steps>

### Luck-Boosting Methods Overview

| Method | Effect | Source | Effort |
| :----- | :----- | :----- | :----- |
| **Ultra/Super/Lucky Gamepasses** | Significant Luck boost | Robux / Gems | Low (one-time purchase) |
| **Raid Farming** | Provides rerolls for traits | Dungeons | High (repeated runs) |
| **Achievements** | Percentage Luck buffs | Various in-game tasks | Medium (diverse tasks) |
| **Shenron Wish** | +1 permanent Luck | Dragon Balls | High (collecting Dragon Balls) |
| **Luck Trait Rerolls** | Unit-specific Luck bonus | Reroll Station | High (requires many rerolls) |
| **Luck Accessories** | Gear-based Luck bonus | Dungeon drops / Quests | Medium (farming specific items) |

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Trait Optimization: Crafting the Perfect Units">
Beyond acquiring high-tier units, their individual traits play a pivotal role in their performance. The right trait combination can elevate a good unit to an exceptional one, making your team significantly more powerful.

<Callout type="tip" title="Optimal Trait Combinations">
For maximum damage, aim for the **Extremist** and **Dead Eye** trait combination. Extremist provides a massive damage buff at the cost of speed, while Dead Eye further boosts damage abilities.
</Callout>

The Igris unit, for instance, benefits greatly from specific traits. While Dead Eye and Annihilator are a strong pairing, Extremist and Dead Eye are considered the absolute best for raw damage output.

### Best Unit Traits for Damage

| Trait | Effect | Ideal For | Notes |
| :---- | :----- | :-------- | :---- |
| **Extremist** | +100% Damage, -25% Speed, +50% Damage Abilities | Pure DPS, Bossing | Highest raw damage potential |
| **Dead Eye** | Boosts damage abilities | All damage dealers | Synergizes well with other damage traits |
| **Annihilator** | High damage output, less impactful than Extremist | General DPS | Good alternative if Extremist is unavailable |
| **Fortune** | Increased Luck | Luck farming teams | Essential for unit acquisition |
| **Rich** | Increased Gold/Yen | Gold farming teams | Essential for currency farming |

To acquire these optimal traits, you'll need to engage in the reroll mechanic. This is where your accumulated rerolls (from raids and other activities) come into play. It's a game of chance, but with enough rerolls, you can outfit your best units with their ideal combinations.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Essential Progression Checklist for Anime Tactical Simulator">
To ensure steady progress and maintain a competitive edge, follow this checklist of key activities and objectives. This will help you manage your resources, acquire better units, and unlock crucial upgrades.

<Checklist
  id="progression-checklist"
  title="Your Weekly Progression Goals:"
  items={[
    "Complete all daily and weekly achievements for luck buffs and resources.",
    "Farm the highest tier raids you can consistently clear for rerolls and unit fragments.",
    "Actively participate in events to earn exclusive units and gamepass currency.",
    "Progress through the Tower mode to unlock additional unit slots without purchasing gamepasses.",
    "Optimize your current units by rerolling for best-in-slot traits.",
    "Save your dungeon keys for potential future updates or high-value events."
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="info" title="Free Unit Slot Expansion">
You can earn up to **four additional unit slots** by completing the Tower mode gameplay, providing a significant advantage without needing to spend Robux on the +2 Units Equip gamepass.
</Callout>

Regularly reviewing your team composition and gamepass strategy against the latest **Anime Tactical Simulator tier list** is also a good practice. The meta can shift with updates, and staying informed will keep you ahead of the curve.

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Which Anime Tactical Simulator gamepasses should I buy first in 2026?",
    answer: "You should prioritize S-tier gamepasses such as **Card Access**, **+3 Cards Open**, and **+2 Units Equip**. These provide the most significant quality-of-life and progression benefits."
  },
  {
    question: "How can I increase my luck in Anime Tactical Simulator?",
    answer: "Increase your luck by purchasing **Lucky gamepasses**, completing **achievements**, making a **Shenron wish** for luck, rerolling units for the **Fortune trait**, and equipping **luck-boosting accessories** like the Richie Armor."
  },
  {
    question: "What are the best traits for units in Anime Tactical Simulator?",
    answer: "For maximum damage, the **Extremist** and **Dead Eye** combination is considered the best. Annihilator is also a strong damage trait. For farming, look for Fortune (Luck) or Rich (Gold) traits."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I get more unit slots without buying gamepasses?",
    answer: "Yes, you can earn up to **four additional unit slots** by successfully completing the various stages of the **Tower mode** gameplay."
  }
]} />

</Section>
